name: faff
description: faff.run — personal coaching app. Production builds from web-v2 (the rewrite). legacy/ retained for reference only. Canonical design: docs/coach/mockups/deck-v1-2026-05-25.html.

scripts.build: cd web-v2 && npm install && npm run build
scripts.legacy:build: cd legacy/web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.eval:voice: cd scripts/voice-eval && echo 'usage: node run.mjs --surface X --mode Y --input candidate.json'
